scripts.build: pnpm -r --if-present run build && cmake -S services/engine-cpp -B services/engine-cpp/build && cmake --build services/engine-cpp/build
scripts.test: pnpm -r --if-present run test && cmake -S services/engine-cpp -B services/engine-cpp/build && ctest --test-dir services/engine-cpp/build --output-on-failure
